examples.title: Algorithm: Session Tracking
examples.code:
ALGORITHM SessionTracking
INPUT: request
OUTPUT: response

BEGIN
 IF request contains session ID THEN
 retrieve session data from database
 ELSE
 create new session ID and store in database
 END IF

 IF request is login THEN
 authenticate user and store user data in session
 ELSE IF request is logout THEN
 invalidate session and remove user data
 END IF

 generate response based on session data
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the basic steps involved in session tracking, including retrieving and storing session data, authenticating users, and invalidating sessions.
